name: Berry Breakfast Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients.
2. Beat the egg whites until fluffy.
3. Beat the liquids together and gently fold in the egg whites.
4. Stir in the dry ingredients.
5. Pour the batter into an oiled cake pan, sprinkle with berries, and place on a baking sheet.
6. Bake at 425°F for 30-35 minutes until golden.
7. Serve hot with butter or your favorite syrup.
